reviews.comment:
Una desilusión increíble baños cerrados para los socios en época de cuarentena siendo que no hay comercios en los alrededores que permanezcan abiertos. Y los preceptos del ACA? Sino te brindan un baño algo tan esencial?

(Translated by Google)
Incredibly disappointing that the restrooms are closed to members during quarantine, especially since there are no shops open nearby. What about the ACA's principles? They can't even provide restrooms, something so essential?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjN09pNUx3EAE
